zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Deol Squyre於1410年出生在英國坎布利其爾貝恩維其可時，他的父親Sir Scipio L' Esquire26歲，母親Elizabeth21歲。他和Lady Margaret Deol至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1460年在英國坎布利其爾多丁頓享年50歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾多丁頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Deol Squyre于1410年出生在英国坎布利其爾貝恩維其可时，他的父亲Sir Scipio L' Esquire26岁，母亲Elizabeth21岁。他和Lady Margaret Deol至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1460年在英国坎布利其爾多丁頓享年50岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾多丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Squyre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Squires
meanings: English: variant of Squire , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Deol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Deol Squyre was born in 1410, in Benwick, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Sir Scipio L' Esquire, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 21. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Lady Margaret Deol. He died in 1460, in Doddington, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Doddington, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Deol Squyre est né en 1410, à Benwick, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Scipio L' Esquire, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Margaret Deol. Il est décédé en 1460, à Doddington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Doddington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.Romney, Hampshire, England: Romney, Hampshire, West Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Deol Squyre 1410 in Benwick, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Scipio L' Esquire 26 und seine Mutter Elizabeth 21. Er hatte mit Lady Margaret Deol mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1460 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Doddington, Cambridgeshire, England und wurde in Doddington, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Deol Squyre è nato il nel 1410 nel Benwick, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Scipio L' Esquire, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Lady Margaret Deol. Morì nel 1460, nel Doddington, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Doddington, Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Deol Squyreが1410年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアベンウィックで生まれた時，父Sir Scipio L' Esquireは26歳，母Elizabethは21歳であった。彼はLady Margaret Deolとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1460年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアドッドイントンで50歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアドッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Deol Squyre(이)가 1410년 영국 캄브리지실르 벤윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Scipio L' Esquire(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Lady Margaret Deol(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 영국 캄브리지실르 도딩턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 도딩턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Deol Squyre nasceu em 1410, em Benwick, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Scipio L' Esquire, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Lady Margaret Deol. Ele faleceu em 1460, em Doddington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Doddington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Deol Squyre родился в 1410 г. в местности бенвикк, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Scipio L' Esquire было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 21. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Lady Margaret Deol. Он умер в 1460 г. в местности доддингтон, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности доддингтон, камбриджешир, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Lady Margaret Deol. Murió en 1460, en Doddington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Doddington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
